title: Morgan: Leading the Future — The Role NSF Can Play — D-RED Seminar Slides (PRISSEM)

content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-05-10 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Morgan: Leading the Future, The Role the National Science Foundation Can Play' presented by Claudia Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM Academic Services, LLC). Positions MSU's research trajectory within NSF's strategic priorities.
